nasb.text: and do not oppress the widow or the orphan, the stranger or the poor; and do not devise evil in your hearts against one another.’

esv.text: do not oppress the widow, the fatherless, the sojourner, or the poor, and let none of you devise evil against another in your heart.”

cnv.text: 寡婦、孤兒、寄居的和貧窮人，你們都不可欺壓，也不可各自心裡圖謀惡事，陷害自己的兄弟。’

ccb.text: 不可欺压寡妇、孤儿、寄居者和穷人，不可设阴谋彼此相害。’
